appraisal_events.evidence: Il lui adressait… des lettres de la dernière violence… « Je vous déshonorerai. » … il l’avait racontée partout… parce qu’il était l’indiscrétion même. Au lieu de cela il était allé le lendemain demander pardon…
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator lowers Charlus by portraying him as impulsive, vindictive in letters, and indiscreet, even threatening to 'dishonor' his aunt over a trivial sum, before abruptly reversing himself with an apology.

status_effects.explanation: Locally he appears volatile and untrustworthy—capable of public shaming and indiscretion—despite a later apology.
